message:
feat(test-utils): add real DB + service test harness (bd-1vr1.3)

Create gateway-harness.ts that boots a temp SQLite DB per test run,
applies all Drizzle migrations, and provides seed/cleanup/exec helpers.
Supports optional Bun HTTP server for integration tests. 8 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
